channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ex-SANDF soldier formally charged with wife’s murder at Westville restaurant
item.description: Fredrik le Roux, a former SANDF special forces operative, has been formally charged with the murder of his wife, Taryn le Roux, at Waxy’s restaurant in Westville last September. Le Roux, 63, is curren...

item.title: Chinese Researchers Develop Eco-Friendly Aqueous Battery with Over 120,000 Cycles Using Tofu-Like Brine Electrolyte
item.description: Researchers from City University of Hong Kong and Southern University of Science and Technology for don develop one new kind of water-based battery wey dey use electrolyte similar to the brine wey dem...

item.title: Amy Wallace discusses posthumous memoir of Virginia Giuffre and the importance of Epstein files
item.description: Amy Wallace, the ghostwriter of Virginia Giuffre’s posthumous memoir 'Nobody’s Girl', reflects on the survivor’s life, legacy, and the publication’s impact. Giuffre, a prominent Epstein accuser, tragi...

item.title: Gachagua Pays Tribute to Ng'eno, Criticises Political Rivals After Helicopter Crash
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has paid a strong tribute to the late Emurua Dikirr MP, Johanna Ng'eno, condemning political rivals who, he says, persecuted Ng'eno in life and now pretend to ...

item.title: Phoenix Suns forward Dillon Brooks arrested for suspected DUI in Scottsdale
item.description: Phoenix Suns forward Dillon Brooks was arrested early Friday morning in Scottsdale, Arizona, on suspicion of driving under the influence. Police conducted a routine traffic stop at 1:33 a.m., leading ...

item.title: Senator Jinggoy Estrada faces criticism for inappropriate question to basketball prospect during Senate hearing
item.description: During a Senate hearing on March 3, 2026, Senator Jinggoy Estrada asked American basketball player and Gilas Women prospect Elizabeth Jeanette Means if she had a Filipino boyfriend. The question, made...

item.title: IGP Disu Yet to Name Substantive Force PRO After Hundeyin's Removal, Giwa Limited to Social Media Duties
item.description: The Inspector-General of Police, Olatunji Disu, has not yet made any official appointment for a new substantive Force Public Relations Officer (FPRO) since he removed Assistant Commissioner of Police ...

item.title: Nvidia's China Permit Issues Fail to Undermine Strong Bull Case
item.description: Recent reports indicate that Chinese customs officials have instructed agents not to permit entry of Nvidia's advanced H200 AI chips, sparking concerns among investors about the company's exposure to ...

item.title: False Quotes on Facebook Wrongly Attributed to President Ruto
item.description: A Facebook page named Kenya News Flash has been circulating graphics that falsely attribute controversial statements to President William Ruto. One graphic claims Ruto threatened Iran over the safety ...

item.title: Trump escalates war demands on Iran amid mediation efforts
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump don escalate tension for Iran war as he dey demand for 'unconditional surrender' just one week after war start wey involve Israel. Trump post am for social media few hours ...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte Challenges House Members to Specify Unexplained Wealth in Her SALN Amid Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has publicly challenged members of the House of Representatives who accused her of having unexplained wealth to specifically point out which parts of her Statement of Asset...

item.title: Celebration of Life Honors Rev. Jesse Jackson's Legacy in Chicago
item.description: The celebration of life for civil rights leader Rev. Jesse Jackson is taking place in Chicago, marking a final public tribute before a private service. Jackson, who passed away in February at 84, is r...

item.title: Trump outlines a three-point approach to Iran
item.description: The article explores former US President Donald Trump's approach towards Iran, focusing on a three-point plan he reportedly has in place. While details remain limited, the commentary raises questions ...

item.title: Attack on ADC Ward 8 Secretariat and Attempt to Block Amaechi’s Convoy in Rivers
item.description: On Friday, armed thugs launched attack for Ubima Community, Ikwerre LGA, Rivers State, targeting members of the African Democratic Congress (ADC). Dem dey destroy the party’s Ward 8 secretariat and ev...

item.title: Dr Agarwal's Eye Hospital Offers Free Eye Camps for Women in Chennai Until March 31
item.description: In Chennai, Dr Agarwal's Eye Hospital is organising free eye check-up camps for women of all ages till March 31. This initiative marks the celebration of International Women's Day and aims to promote ...

item.title: Why Companies Should Prioritise Recruitment in the First Quarter
item.description: Many top-performing companies no dey wait until mid-year before dem start to hire new staff. Instead, dem dey push recruitment drive right from the first quarter (January to March) because na the best...

item.title: Historic South African Wesbank Audi S4 GTO race car listed for online auction
item.description: On 6 March 2026, a piece of South African motorsport history will be up for grabs when Collectingcars.com hosts an online auction featuring the legendary Audi S4 GTO. This iconic left-hand drive race ...

item.title: Nation Media Group Introduces AI Guidelines for Journalists
item.description: Nation Media Group (NMG), one of Kenya's leading media houses, has rolled out a new policy to guide the ethical and responsible use of artificial intelligence (AI) in its journalism operations. The po...

item.title: TPLB issues suspensions and fines to players, referees, and clubs after disciplinary incidents
item.description: The Tanzania Premier League Board (TPLB) has handed out several disciplinary actions following misconduct in recent NBC Premier League matches. Simba SC striker Seleman Mwalimu received a three-match ...

item.title: Winnipeg Woman Dies in Dominican Republic Bus Crash, Remembered for Generosity and Compassion
item.description: Kim Lafantaisie, a 57-year-old woman from Winnipeg, tragically died in a bus crash in Villa Hermosa, Dominican Republic, while on vacation with her husband. Known for her selflessness and generosity, ...
